summary: Accepted: Q067-Q072 are aligned with prior-turn follow-up, and Q070 matches the sidecar domain-expansion intent. Accepted: Q073 correctly preserves the ISP/ISMP dynamic-seed thread, with the resolved one-turn variant trading fidelity for cheaper smoke coverage. Accepted: Q075-Q081 are labeled as abstention cases and the prompts are boundary-style unsupported claims. Risky: Q082-Q089 are broadly useful persona/business rewrites, but a few are generic enough that grounded usefulness may hinge on the earlier transcript quality. Needs review: the resolved_one_turn variants are intentionally shorter and may under-test memory-sensitive behavior compared with multiturn.

outputs.description: raw worker review preserved before schema normalization

accepted_fields_or_changes: Keep Q070 aligned with L120 sidecar domain-expansion intent.
Keep Q073 dynamic S_INCHEON_JOB_ISP seed for ISP/ISMP terminology context.
Keep Q075-Q081 as unsupported-boundary abstention cases.
Keep resolved-one-turn as cheaper smoke and multiturn as faithful memory evaluation.
rejected_or_risky_items: Q082-Q089 usefulness depends on earlier transcript quality, so judge/readback must include usefulness/evidence-fit gates.
Resolved-one-turn variants under-test memory-sensitive behavior compared with multiturn.
needs_orchestrator_review: Choose resolved-one-turn only for low-cost smoke; use multiturn for memory claims.

observed_results: Reviewed the requested Q067, Q069-Q073, Q075, Q077, Q079-Q081, and Q082-Q089 entries directly from the batch and question files, plus the Q070 sidecar note. No external files were edited.
